data.title: OpenAI sparks crypto frenzy with GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra and Luna names
data.summary: OpenAI launches limited preview of GPT-5.6 models Sol, Terra, and Luna; names resemble Solana and Terra crypto projects but are unrelated per company.

content: Instead, the company said the names represent different capability levels within the GPT-5.6 series.
The preview follows reports that the White House had asked OpenAI to limit the initial rollout of GPT-5.6.
summary: OpenAI launches limited preview of GPT-5.6 models Sol, Terra, and Luna; names resemble Solana and Terra crypto projects but are unrelated per company.
title: OpenAI sparks crypto frenzy with GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra and Luna names

data.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.6 Series Models; Names “Sol,” “Terra,” and “Lun…
data.summary: OpenAI releases GPT-5.6 series Sol (flagship), Terra (work balance), Luna (efficient) in limited preview; names overlap crypto projects.

content: TechFlow News, on June 27, OpenAI released its next-generation GPT-5.6 series models, comprising three products: Sol, Terra, and Luna.
Currently, the GPT-5.6 series is available only to select partners through a limited preview; OpenAI plans to gradually expand access over the coming weeks
summary: OpenAI releases GPT-5.6 series Sol (flagship), Terra (work balance), Luna (efficient) in limited preview; names overlap crypto projects.
title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.6 Series Models; Names “Sol,” “Terra,” and “Lun…

data.title: OpenAI’s Luna name turned Terra’s dead token into a YOLO leverage trade
data.summary: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 "Luna" tier triggered LUNA2 futures surge on Binance from $0.0486 to $0.0513, OI up 43%.

content: OpenAI introduced GPT-5.6 on June 26 as a limited-preview family of frontier models with three tiers: Sol as the flagship, Terra as the balanced mid-range
LUNA2 futures open interest surged 43% and price climbed from $0.0486 to $0.0513 in the hour after OpenAI announced its GPT-5.6 tiers Sol, Terra, and Luna
summary: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 "Luna" tier triggered LUNA2 futures surge on Binance from $0.0486 to $0.0513, OI up 43%.

data.title: OpenAI named the model "Luna", crypto immediately leveraged up Terra'…
data.summary: OpenAI GPT-5.6 tiers named Sol/Terra/Luna triggered 43% LUNA2 perpetuals OI surge on Binance via name collision.

content: Author: Gino Matos Translation: TechFlow **TechFlow Editor's Note:** OpenAI releases GPT-5.6, with three tiers named Sol, Terra, and Luna respectively
-5.6, positioned as a limited preview cutting-edge model series, with three tiers: Sol is the flagship version, Terra is the balanced mid-tier option,
summary: OpenAI GPT-5.6 tiers named Sol/Terra/Luna triggered 43% LUNA2 perpetuals OI surge on Binance via name collision.

data.summary: GLM 5.2 beats Claude in cyber benchmarks; US delays GPT-5.6 release; Bitcoin falls below $60k; Korea unveils 2000T KRW chip investment plan.

content: 应美国政府审查要求延迟 GPT-5.6 发布，AI 监管正式从"指南"变为"前置审批"。

data.title: Over 3,000 Mexicans Fall for Suspected Crypto Trading Bot Scam
data.summary: Mexican media: 3,000+ in Tehuacán and Puebla allegedly scammed by AMG GPT crypto bots; withdrawals blocked, offices closed; 100 complaints, probe ongoing

content: that more than 3,000 residents in Tehuacán and Puebla were suspected of being scammed by cryptocurrency trading robots, and the company involved was AMG GPT
AMG GPT finally stated that the delayed withdrawal was related to the "shopping festival event", but this explanation raised more questions.
summary: Mexican media: 3,000+ in Tehuacán and Puebla allegedly scammed by AMG GPT crypto bots; withdrawals blocked, offices closed; 100 complaints, probe ongoing

data.title: Microsoft is boosting capacity to support OpenAI’s GPT-4-5, GPT-5 models
data.summary: Microsoft is boosting Azure capacity to host OpenAI’s GPT-4.5 as early as next week and expects GPT-5 in late May amid an expanded partnership

content: [Microsoft is boosting capacity to support OpenAI’s GPT-4-5, GPT-5 models](https://images.cointelegraph.com/cdn-cgi/image/format=auto,onerror=redirect,
In addition to expecting GPT-4.5 any day now, The Verge’s source said Microsoft expects to receive the [more powerful GPT-5](https://cointelegraph.com/
summary: Microsoft is boosting Azure capacity to host OpenAI’s GPT-4.5 as early as next week and expects GPT-5 in late May amid an expanded partnership
title: Microsoft is boosting capacity to support OpenAI’s GPT-4-5, GPT-5 models

data.title: Sam Altman Shares OpenAI Plans for GPT-4.5 and GPT-5, WLD Token Jumps 5%
data.summary: Sam Altman unveils GPT-4.5 (Orion) and GPT-5; GPT-5 across ChatGPT tiers. WLD rose ~5%. Reports cite Musk’s $97B OpenAI bid; Altman rejects.

content: Free-tier users will get unlimited access to GPT-5 at a standard intelligence level.
OpenAI’s next steps with GPT-4.5 and GPT-5 will be crucial as the [artificial intelligence arms race](https://beincrypto.com/learn/ai-crypto) intensifies
summary: Sam Altman unveils GPT-4.5 (Orion) and GPT-5; GPT-5 across ChatGPT tiers. WLD rose ~5%. Reports cite Musk’s $97B OpenAI bid; Altman rejects.
title: Sam Altman Shares OpenAI Plans for GPT-4.5 and GPT-5, WLD Token Jumps 5%

data.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 Launch Spurs Market Surge
data.summary: OpenAI launches GPT-5.5, surging GPT-5.5 sub-market 25 points to 86%; all sub-markets settle at 100% Yes. USDC volume: $342K; open interest: $373K.

content: OpenAI has officially launched GPT-5.5, leading to a significant market reaction.
On April 23, the sub-market for GPT-5.5 surged by 25 points, climbing from 61% to 86% in anticipation of the release.
summary: OpenAI launches GPT-5.5, surging GPT-5.5 sub-market 25 points to 86%; all sub-markets settle at 100% Yes. USDC volume: $342K; open interest: $373K.
title: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 Launch Spurs Market Surge
